title: - Paste appearance settings only into `Cosmetic` profile.
content:
- Paste appearance settings only into `Cosmetic` profile.

**Suggested Cosmetic Settings Block (Keep)**
```jsonc
{
"workbench.colorTheme": "Default Dark+",
"workbench.preferredDarkColorTheme": "Visual Studio Dark",
"workbench.preferredLightColorTheme": "Transparent Color Theme",
"peacock.keepBadgeColor": true,
"peacock.keepForegroundColor": true,
"animations.Enabled": true,
"animations.CursorAnimation": true,
"animations.Scrolling": "Fade",
"editor.inlayHints.padding": true,
"workbench.editor.pinnedTabsOnSeparateRow": true,
"window.autoDetectColorScheme": true
}
```

**Settings to Stage Later (After Stability Pass)**
```jsonc
{
"vscode_vibrancy.enableAutoTheme": true,
"vscode_vibrancy.type": "under-window",
"vscode_vibrancy.forceFramelessWindow": true,
